channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: WordPress Has a DX Problem, and Developers Are Paying for It
item.description: Cross-posted from the Loopress docs Loopress is a toolset to make WordPress reproducible and reviewable via Git. Versioned snippets, Composer without SSH, and more coming... Check Loopress...

item.title: Why a Coding-Agent Completion Event Is Not Enough
item.description: A terminal monitor sees task_complete. It sends an alert. The user returns and finds that the event belongs to an old turn, a background worker, or a session they already resumed. The parser found...

item.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
GitHub for Beginners: Your roadmap to mastering the GitHub essentials
item.description: New to GitHub? This beginner's guide explains version control, repositories, and pull requests—plus everything else you need to start working confidently on GitHub. The post GitHub for Beginners:...

item.title: From a GEO Guide to a GEO Skill: A Practical Workflow for AI Search
item.description: TL;DR — I recently launched GEO Basics, a free and open-source guide to Generative Engine Optimization in English and Brazilian Portuguese. Now, I have turned that approach into a reusable GEO...

item.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
Understanding HTML Attributes
item.description: What are HTML Attributes? HTML attributes provide additional information about an HTML element. They help the browser understand how an element should behave, what extra information it contains,...

item.title: How I built a lightweight standalone behavioral anti-stealer to protect my Windows environment
item.description: Hey everyone, Tired of bloated corporate solutions eating up hundreds of megabytes of RAM just to monitor active local connections, I decided to build a lightweight, standalone behavioral...

item.title: Supabase Backups Don't Include Your Storage Files. Here's What Does.
item.description: The restore finished clean. pg_restore exited 0, every table came back, row counts matched, the app booted. Twenty minutes later the first support message arrived: profile pictures were broken....

item.title: Lucid’s bankruptcy rumor is a bad sign for the EV future
item.description: Lucid Motors found itself in a tough bind this week, fending off bankruptcy rumors and watching its stock price plunge as a result. The company quickly denied the report, calling it "completely...

item.title: Mastering Java Loops: Under the Hood, Memory Pitfalls, and High-Scale Optimizations
item.description: An architectural guide to understanding JVM loop bytecode, avoiding the silent GC traps of autoboxing, and engineering ultra-high-throughput loops. Loops are the fundamental engines of data...

item.title: Four Instances, Two Data Centers, One Bug: When Redundancy Isn't Independence
item.description: Four instances of the core service. Two physically separate data centers. And a single operating-system defect degraded the whole thing across an entire state anyway. That's the one-line version...

item.title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
item.description: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest...

item.title: E3 Strategy Dramatically Improves LLM Agent Efficiency in Engineering Workflows
item.description: What Changed Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed to automate complex, multi-step engineering and informatics workflows. While powerful, these agents frequently exhibit a...

item.title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
item.description: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

item.title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
item.description: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and...

item.title: Netflix tries to recapture Stranger Things magic with nostalgic re-release
item.description: Netflix just can't let Stranger Things go. Since the final episode aired on New Year's Eve there's been a behind-the-scenes documentary, an animated series that expands the story, and now, on the...

item.title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
item.description: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

item.title: Samsung shows off ‘brand new shape’ for Z Fold 8 in Spider-Man teaser
item.description: Samsung gave a sneak peek of the "brand new shape" for its upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 in a new teaser for Spider-Man: Brand New Day. The video includes a few shots of Spidey taking a foldable phone...

item.title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
item.description: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy...

item.title: OkoBot Malware Framework Injects Seed Phrase Phishing Into Ledger and Trezor Apps
item.description: A malware framework called OkoBot has been running on Windows machines since April 2025, and one of its modules is built to con hardware wallet owners out of their recovery phrase. On an infected...

item.title: Daylight saving time is a step closer to becoming permanent in the US
item.description: The US is getting closer to observing daylight saving time year-round. On Tuesday, the House advanced the Sunshine Protection Act on a 308 to 117 vote, which would turn clocks one hour ahead...

item.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
item.description: Apple Intelligence is headed to China after regulators approved Apple’s AI services through a partnership with Alibaba. The long-rumored deal will bring Alibaba’s Qwen AI models to Apple’s...

item.title: JBL’s Flip 7 speaker is small, versatile, and 40 percent off
item.description: Sure, Bluetooth speakers are awesome to have for picturesque beach trips, camping weekends, and other outdoor adventures. But they’re just as good to have for some sprinkler time in the yard with...

item.title: 8BitDo’s FlipPad is the most pocketable way to turn your phone into a Game Boy
item.description: Both 8BitDo and GameSir announced tiny gamepads designed to turn smartphones into Game Boy-inspired handhelds at CES 2026. GameSir released its Pocket Taco months ago, but the longer wait for...

item.title: Firefox, Chrome, Adobe, and VMware Updates Fix Multiple Critical Security Flaws
item.description: Mozilla has released updates to address two critical flaws in Firefox for which it warned that exploit code has been published. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-15718, an invalid...

item.title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
item.description: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

item.title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
item.description: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

item.title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
item.description: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

item.title: The tiniest MMO
item.description: At its peak, around 12 million people subscribed to World of Warcraft so that they could explore the realm of Azeroth together. The audience for PointlessQuest is quite a bit smaller. On launch...
